# HubSpot Sales Hub — Pricing

## Sales Hub Plans (SGD/mo/seat)

| Plan | Monthly | Annual | HubSpot Credits | One-Time Onboarding |
|------|---------|--------|-----------------|-------------------|
| **Free** | SGD 0/mo | SGD 0/mo | N/A | N/A |
| **Starter** | SGD 13/mo | SGD 13/mo | 500 | — |
| **Professional** | SGD 126/mo | SGD 140/mo | 3,000 | SGD 2,100 |
| **Enterprise** | SGD 210/mo | Custom | 5,000 | SGD 4,900 |

**Free plan includes:** Up to 2 users, basic sales tools, deal tracking, contact management.

## Additional Hub Tiers

- **Marketing Hub Starter**: SGD 13/mo/seat (was SGD 21)
- **Marketing Hub Professional**: SGD 1,120/mo + SGD 63/mo/additional seat
- **Marketing Hub Enterprise**: SGD 5,100/mo + SGD 105/mo/additional seat

## Usage Model

- Not credit-based; feature access is gated by plan tier
- Email sends are largely unlimited within plan; sequences available from Starter
- Calling minutes are metered (limited on lower tiers)
- AI features (e.g. AI email assistant) introduced on Professional and above

## TCO Notes

- HubSpot's true cost is often obscured by mandatory onboarding fees on Professional ($1,500+) and Enterprise ($3,500+)
- The free CRM is powerful but cold email sequencing requires at least the Starter plan
- Works best when the whole GTM stack is in HubSpot — otherwise integration overhead is high
- Overkill for pure cold outreach; Apollo or Instantly will be cheaper for most solo/small-team use cases
